1（請使用者過目）**：圖片有沒有漏抽、賠付表數字對不對、\\n關鍵玩法圖是否對應到正確章節。\\n\\n## 步驟 2：差異開發規格（核心）\\n\\n輸入四樣：`docs/spec/` + `uk_slot_template` 現碼 + `uk-slot-pattern-library` +\\nproto d.ts（若已發佈）。產出 `docs/dev-spec.md`，含兩張表：\\n\\n### 功能分類表\\n\\n規格書每個功能標一類：\\n\\n| 分類 | 意義 | dev-spec 裡要寫的 |\\n|------|------|------------------|\\n| 🟢 模板已有 | Standard/Cascade/Tumble、基本 UI 等 | 只列設定值 |\\n| 🟡 有既成模式 | ExtraBet、FakeReel、狀態機等 | 標對應 skill 名 |\\n| 🔴 本作特有 | 新機制（如能量收集、輪盤選獎） | 附一段迷你設計 |\\n\\n🔴 清單就是真正的工作量所在。\\n\\n### proto 映射表\\n\\n功能 ↔ proto 欄位對照。**proto 未發佈時**：整表標 ⏳，每項記錄\\n「假設的資料形狀」，proto 到手後回來逐項核對假設，不符就修 dev-spec。\\n\\n**檢查點 2（請使用者過目）**：🔴 清單有沒有漏、分類有沒有錯、proto 假設合不合理。\\n\\n## 步驟 3：Milestone 任務拆解\\n\\n寫入 `<game>/SPEC.md`，骨架按依賴排序、milestone 內按機制垂直切：\\n\\n| Milestone | 內容 | 前置 Polish（NearMiss、音效、動畫細節） | M2 |\\n| M4 | 收尾（多語系 sync、全流程 replay、賠付核對） | M3 |\\n\\n規則：\\n- 每個任務帶三要素：**規格出處**（spec 章節）、**對應 skill**（🟡 類）、\\n  **可驗證的驗收標準**\\n- **每個 M2 機制的驗收標準必含該機制 unshow/replay 把整份規格書當實作範圍 → 先做差異分析，只實作 delta\\n- ❌ 跳過人工檢查點直接往下走 → 源頭錯誤全線放大\\n- ❌ unshow/replay 還原留到專案尾聲 → 放進每個機制的驗收標準\\n- ❌ proto 假設寫完不回頭核對 → proto 到手後必須逐項驗證 ⏳ 項目\\n\"}"</parameters>

  <narrative>Created canonical skill documentation for the UK slot game development workflow that transforms Excel specifications into implemented games. The workflow emphasizes differential development - since all UK slot games start from uk_slot_template via git archive (preserving only version-controlled content without template history), the actual work is only the delta between spec and template capabilities.

The three-step process begins with excel-to-ai-doc skill converting xlsx to markdown + images + metadata in docs/spec/, followed by a human checkpoint. Step 2 performs differential analysis against template code, uk-slot-pattern-library, and proto definitions to generate docs/dev-spec.md containing a feature classification table (template-provided 🟢, pattern-based 🟡, or game-specific 🔴) and proto field mapping. Another human checkpoint ensures correct classification and proto assumptions. Step 3 breaks work into dependency-ordered milestones in SPEC.md.

M0a project setup procedure codifies the established pattern: git archive extracts uk_slot_template HEAD to new directory (bringing gameSetting.json and Tools_SlotSetUP scripts), git init creates fresh history, FirstClone.bat clones slotExtensions-client (Astarte framework) into extensions/ as independent repo, npm install rebuilds dependencies, and configuration updates set GameId/ShortGameName/layout. This approach avoids git fork/clone which would carry template commit history into game-specific repos.

The milestone structure (M0a→M0b→M1→M2→M3→M4) sequences work by dependency, with M2 dedicating one task per 🔴 game-specific mechanism. Documentation mandates each M2 task include unshow/replay restoration in acceptance criteria to prevent last-minute integration issues. When proto arrives late, M0a and 🔴 mechanism design can proceed, but M0b+ implementation waits for proto.

Common errors section warns against git clone/fork for project setup, treating full spec as implementation scope without differential analysis, skipping human checkpoints, deferring unshow/replay to project end, and failing to validate proto assumptions when proto arrives.</narrative>
